violations.text: The double stacked alto-sham near the oven was observed in poor repair. The top cabinet was observed maintaining an ambient of 111 degrees Fahrenheit. The bottom gasket was observed to be frayed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to send all equipment and utensils to another facility to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized due to the lack of 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
The dishwasher was observed in poor repair (chlorine sanitizing solution 0 ppm). Dishwasher to not be used until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
The floors in ware washing area is in poor repair (large areas of chipped paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The floors in ware washing area is in poor repair (large areas of chipped paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023

Milk chest located in the serving area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Per interview with PIC food was prepped one hour prior to inspection. PIC removed food product to another refrigeration unit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves throughout kitchen and serving area have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023

The sink(2 bay sink) used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The floors throughout kitchen under/behind equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
The floors in ware washing area is in poor repair(large areas of chipped paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023

Various food items were observed held at 49 degrees or higher degrees Fahrenheit in the two door reach in (50 ambient) and the chest cooler (44 ambient). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in units 2 hours prior to visit and moved to proper refrigeration/freezers to properly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

The following were observed in poor repair/improper adjustment: 1) The two door reach in cooler near the lunch service line was observed with an ambient of 50 degrees Fahrenheit. 2) The chest cooler observed with an ambient of 44 degrees Fahrenheit. - Units taken out of service until it can be serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
